Home.metaDesc: Digital forensics software, automation, and evidence analysis for investigations, legal teams, compliance, and critical operations.
Home.heroTitle: Technology for digital forensics, investigations, and critical operations
Home.heroSubtitle: We build digital forensics software, automation, and evidence analysis systems for forensic teams, legal departments, compliance, and data-sensitive operations.
Home.aboutP1: We are a technology company specialized in building software, data platforms and systems for environments that demand control, auditability and traceability. We work with SaaS, BI, automations and integrations for regulated and high-responsibility sectors.
Home.aboutP2: From digital file forensics to critical data governance, we design solutions to reduce operational risk and increase decision-making security.
Home.howCard1Desc: SaaS, custom systems, analytical dashboards, automations and integrated applications.
Home.howCard2Desc: Performance, security and measurable results in every solution delivered.
Home.howCard3Desc: Over 20 years in public safety, management and operational analysis.
Home.sectorsSubtitle: We operate in segments that handle critical data, regulatory requirements and high-level technical responsibility.
Home.sector1Desc: Digital evidence workflows, document management and audit trails for litigation support.
Home.sector2Desc: Systems for forensic management, evidence tracking and operational intelligence with traceability.
Home.sector3Desc: Critical process control, data governance and audit trails for compliance.
Home.sector4Desc: Property operations with auditable records, document integrity and automated workflows.
Home.sector5Desc: Operations monitoring and technical documentation for fast, reliable decisions.
Home.sector6Desc: Evidence management, reports and incident tracking for regulatory compliance.
Home.sectorsCta: Your industry not listed? Talk to a specialist
Home.quoteText: We believe in solutions built to solve real problems. That's why every project is designed end-to-end: architecture, user experience, security, scalability and direct impact on your day-to-day operations.
Home.servicesTitle: Software and services for digital forensics and critical operations
Home.servicesSubtitle: We design and evolve software with traceability, audit, and security for investigations, compliance, and high-impact decisions.
Home.coreService2: SaaS Platforms for Critical Data & Documents
Home.servicesFootnote: Serving public and private sectors | Demos available upon request
Home.ctaFinalSubtitle: Discover our solutions and see how we can support your operation with technology and traceability.

MetaScope.seoTitle: MetaScope Forensic | Digital Forensics Software for Files, Images, and Links
MetaScope.seoMetaDesc: Digital forensics software for files, images, videos, PDFs, and suspicious links with metadata analysis, SHA-256 integrity checks, manipulation signals, and forensic PDF reports.
MetaScope.seoOgDesc: Digital forensics tool for file analysis, suspicious links and screenshots with technical evidence and PDF report.
MetaScope.seoOgImageAlt: MetaScope Forensic - forensic validation and analysis dashboard
MetaScope.seoAppDesc: Web-based forensic decision support tool for validating authenticity and integrity of digital files, links and suspicious screenshots.
MetaScope.seoFeature4: Suspicious link and screenshot analysis with OCR
MetaScope.heroTag: Digital forensics for files, screenshots, and suspicious links
MetaScope.heroTitle: Digital forensics software for file authenticity and fraud analysis.
MetaScope.heroDesc: Analyze images, videos, PDFs, screenshots, and suspicious links with metadata extraction, SHA-256 checks, manipulation signals, and forensic PDF reports.
MetaScope.limitsText: images and videos up to {imgLimit} • documents up to {docLimit} • upload via drag/drop or link.
MetaScope.pdfReportDesc: Export with evidence, indicators and consolidated findings.
MetaScope.privacyFocusDesc: Processing occurs in the browser; files are not stored on any server.
MetaScope.controlledAccessDesc: Accounts created manually for testing and validation (no public sign-up).
MetaScope.techNoteDesc: Automated results indicate signs/evidence based on technical analysis and may not be 100% conclusive.
MetaScope.chooseToolSubtitle: Use image authenticity verification and deepfake detection software to validate media, or analyze suspicious links to block phishing and digital fraud.
MetaScope.fileAnalysisDesc: Analyze images and videos to identify signs of manipulation, AI generation, and technical inconsistencies in evidence, screenshots, and visual attachments.
MetaScope.filePrivacyDesc: Fully local processing. Your files are {never} sent to the cloud.
MetaScope.fileBullet2: Initial triage with forensic PDF report
MetaScope.fileBullet3: Ideal for evidence, screenshots, and digital attachments
MetaScope.fileDisclaimer: * Technical results based on binary structure and metadata.
MetaScope.docAnalysisDesc: Verify authenticity, integrity, and signs of alteration in contracts, petitions, reports, and corporate documents.
MetaScope.docPrivacyDesc: Isolated local validation strictly focused on original file hashing and document digital signatures.
MetaScope.docBullet2: DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, and CSV: preliminary triage
MetaScope.threatAnalysisDesc: Evaluate suspicious links, screenshots, and messages to identify phishing, fake domains, and signs of social engineering.
MetaScope.threatSafeDesc: Automatic click prevention. External analysis on the provided URL.
MetaScope.threatBullet1: Suspicious links, phishing, and fake domains
MetaScope.threatBullet2: URLs and screenshots with secure analysis
MetaScope.threatDisclaimer: * Indicators help in quick endpoint blocking decisions.
MetaScope.casesTitle: Real fraud cases analyzed with MetaScope
MetaScope.casesSubtitle: See investigations where MetaScope helped validate authenticity, detect manipulation, and identify digital fraud with technical evidence.
MetaScope.caseFeaturedDesc: Complete analysis of a WhatsApp scam. The system processes the evidence and delivers a {reportReady}.
MetaScope.caseATPVDesc: Digital vehicle document with signs of editing. Metadata and PDF structure analysis revealed manipulation.
MetaScope.caseDeepfakeDesc: Viral image circulating on global social media. Our deepfake detection software runs technical analysis to expose synthetic manipulation.
MetaScope.caseDeepfakeVerdict: Verdict: Strong signs of AI generation.
MetaScope.casePhishingDesc: Message about withheld delivery or pending fee. Technical analysis revealed a fake link mimicking official site.
MetaScope.casePhishingVerdict: Verdict: Malicious link and urgency tactic.
MetaScope.caseAuthDesc: Photo sent by an expert to validate an alibi in London. Image authenticity verification required for metadata and original GPS.
MetaScope.caseAuthVerdict: Verdict: Authentic. GPS and metadata confirmed.
MetaScope.audienceSubtitle: MetaScope is designed for scenarios where evidence integrity is fundamental and doubt is not an option.
MetaScope.audienceForensicsDesc: Initial evidence triage, integrity validation and support for technical reports.
MetaScope.audienceLegalDesc: Technical foundation for legal proceedings with exportable PDF reports.
MetaScope.audienceSecurityDesc: Suspicious file analysis and prevention of fraud or data leaks.
MetaScope.audienceJournalismDesc: Authenticity verification of media (fakes/AI) and source validation.
MetaScope.featuresTitle: Digital forensics features for files, links, and deepfakes
MetaScope.featuresSubtitle: Turn files, screenshots, and suspicious links into technical evidence with a multi-layer forensic analysis engine.
MetaScope.featureAntifraudDesc: Paste a link or send a suspicious screenshot. Identify signs of fake websites, homography and social engineering tactics before clicking.
MetaScope.featureIntegrityDesc: Strengthen the technical foundation of your evidence. Extract hidden metadata and calculate SHA-256 hash for legal validity.
MetaScope.featureDeepfakeDesc: Assess authenticity. Our AI analyzes invisible patterns and digital noise to indicate probability of synthetic manipulation.
MetaScope.featureGPSDesc: Map the exact capture location. Interactive visualization of GPS coordinates when available in file metadata.
MetaScope.howItWorksTitle: You don't start with the report. You start with the evidence.
MetaScope.howItWorksSubtitle: With MetaScope, you run technical triage first, go deeper into sensitive cases using Deep Research, and only request an expert report when technically validated.
MetaScope.howStep1Desc: Run an initial triage without extra costs to filter volume and single out what really needs further investigation. All in your dashboard.
MetaScope.howStep2Desc: Trigger Deep Research modules strictly for cases with a sensitive context, real doubts, or high legal fraud risk.
MetaScope.howStep3Desc: When there is technical merit, convert your analysis into an Expert Report digitally signed by a Digital Forensic Examiner.
MetaScope.seoSectionTitle: Digital forensics software for files, images, and suspicious links
MetaScope.seoSectionDesc: MetaScope was built for real-world digital forensics. The platform combines forensic file analysis, image authenticity checks, EXIF metadata inspection, SHA-256 integrity verification, and suspicious link and screenshot analysis with OCR to support technical decisions with more confidence.
MetaScope.faqTitle: FAQ about digital forensics and suspicious files
MetaScope.faqSubtitle: Clear answers about authenticity checks, metadata, suspicious links, privacy, and how to interpret the analysis.
MetaScope.faq1Q: Does MetaScope replace a formal forensic examination?
MetaScope.faq1A: No. MetaScope is a technical support tool for triage, validation, and documentation. In critical cases, it should be complemented by a formal forensic examination.
MetaScope.faq2Q: How can I analyze a suspicious link without clicking it?
MetaScope.faq2A: Use safe mode: copy the link address without opening the page and paste it for analysis. You can also upload a screenshot for OCR-based review. This reduces the risk of opening malicious content.
MetaScope.faq3Q: How can I tell whether an image may be AI-generated?
MetaScope.faq3A: MetaScope looks for technical signs of synthetic generation and manipulation, including inconsistent patterns, metadata clues, and layered evidence. The output is decision support, not an absolute conclusion.
MetaScope.faq4Q: Does MetaScope store my files, PDFs, or screenshots?
MetaScope.faq4A: No. Processing happens in the browser, and the files are not stored on the server.
MetaScope.faq5Q: How do I check metadata and GPS location from an image?
MetaScope.faq5A: The system extracts technical metadata, including EXIF and timestamps. GPS data is only available when the original file still contains EXIF location data, since many platforms strip it during upload or reposting.
MetaScope.faq6Q: Why does SHA-256 matter in digital forensics?
MetaScope.faq6A: A SHA-256 hash works like a fingerprint for the file. It helps verify integrity and strengthens the traceability of the analyzed material.
MetaScope.faq7Q: What does MetaScope detect in suspicious links and screenshots?
MetaScope.faq7A: MetaScope identifies phishing and fraud signals such as homograph domains, typosquatting, artificial urgency, social engineering tactics, and OCR-extracted clues from screenshots. When available, it can also use external reputation sources to strengthen the assessment.
MetaScope.faq8Q: How do I request access to the digital forensics software?
MetaScope.faq8A: Access is controlled and granted upon request. Submit an evaluation request and, once approved, you will receive credentials to test the platform.
MetaScope.transparencyDesc: Automated analyses are based on technical evidence and may vary depending on the file and available metadata. Use the results as support and complement when necessary.
MetaScope.gallerySubtitle: Interface designed for forensic agility. Browse dashboards, metadata visualization and analysis tools.
MetaScope.galleryImg1Desc: Unified main panel: choose between Forensic File Validation or Digital Threat Analysis.
MetaScope.galleryImg2Desc: Metadata and technical evidence: EXIF/timestamps, SHA-256 hash and forensic conclusion.
MetaScope.galleryImg3Desc: Layered AI detection with score and technical justifications.
MetaScope.galleryImg4Desc: Geolocation extraction when available in file (EXIF GPS) and visualization.
MetaScope.galleryImg5Desc: Threat Analysis: paste suspicious links for safe verification before any interaction.
MetaScope.galleryImg6Desc: Homograph Alert (Punycode): detects attacks where fake domains use characters visually identical to official ones.
MetaScope.galleryImg7Desc: Screenshot Analysis (OCR): detects phishing and social engineering in message captures (WhatsApp/SMS/Email).
MetaScope.finalCtaTitle: Ready to back your decisions with irrefutable technical evidence?
MetaScope.finalCtaDesc: Access is focused on professionals and critical operations. Request credentials to test our digital forensics software with real cases from your workflow.
MetaScope.finalLimits: Current limits: images/videos up to {imgLimit} • documents up to {docLimit}.
MetaScope.finalSecurityQuestion: Questions about security or legal use?

CondoHub.seoTitle: CondoHub – Smart Management & Tracking System for Properties and HOAs
CondoHub.seoMetaDesc: SaaS platform for property management with focus on governance. Auditable logs, resident dossiers, digital time clock and single-tenant architecture.
CondoHub.seoOgDesc: Property management with digital forensics framework: fine logs, HR time clock, zero crossover compliant with data protection laws.
CondoHub.heroTitle: The Ultimate System for Smart, Auditable Condominium Management.
CondoHub.heroDesc: Comprehensive SaaS platform centralizing property management with a high focus on governance. Auditable records, resident dossiers, a digital time clock system, robust infraction workflows and secure visitor control in an isolated single-tenant architecture.
CondoHub.limitsText: isolated single-tenant architecture. No data crossover.
CondoHub.privacyLine: True governance and traceability. See our
CondoHub.pdfReportDesc: Structured timeline tracking the full history of incidents.
CondoHub.privacyFocusDesc: No warnings are definitively deleted without logical soft-deletes.
CondoHub.controlledAccessDesc: Residents, Concierge and Administration access only approved data.
CondoHub.techNoteDesc: CondoHub spins up completely separate database instances. Zero cross-leakage risk.
CondoHub.chooseToolSubtitle: CondoHub aims to empower Residents, Administration and Concierge simultaneously.
CondoHub.fileAnalysisDesc: Autonomy for residents with a secure and direct communication hub.
CondoHub.filePrivacyDesc: Complaints and {boletos} tickets are exclusive to the resident and admin.
CondoHub.fileBullet1: Smart booking engine for common areas with tailored shifts
CondoHub.fileBullet2: Proactive visitor clearance—preset dates and times streamlined
CondoHub.fileBullet3: Ticketing core for requesting new bill copies from management
CondoHub.fileBullet4: Exclusive, verified internal marketplace for the condominium
CondoHub.fileDisclaimer: * Residents hold absolute control over their entry approvals natively.
CondoHub.threatAnalysisDesc: Control, compliance, and real-time operational tools for property managers, {noClickRisk}.
CondoHub.threatSafeDesc: Automated infraction escalation workflow: {doNotOpen} → Written → Fine.
CondoHub.threatBullet1: Complete HR digital time clock with smart alerts (breaks, overtime)
CondoHub.threatBullet2: Broadcast real-time emergency notices securely instantly
CondoHub.threatBullet3: Agile reception screening: expected visitors pre-populated
CondoHub.threatBullet4: Absolute separation: Staff explicitly barred from financial views
CondoHub.threatDisclaimer: * Dashboards consolidate infractions, support tickets and HR logs visually.
CondoHub.casesSubtitle: Delivering unparalleled trustworthiness for facility compliance under forensic logic.
CondoHub.caseFeaturedDesc: Use Resident Dossiers to confidently justify decisions and deliver {reportReady}.
CondoHub.audienceSubtitle: Designed for properties requiring strict security, digital governance and uncompromising compliance.
CondoHub.audienceForensicsDesc: Dashboards combining time clocks, communications and dossiers.
CondoHub.audienceLegalDesc: Traceable ticketing replacing confusing WhatsApp demands natively.
CondoHub.audienceSecurityDesc: Easy marketplace, booking autonomy and visit control via mobile access.
CondoHub.audienceJournalismDesc: Eliminate confusion over unlisted guests with pre-auth screens.
CondoHub.featuresSubtitle: CondoHub treats property operations as a highly critical corporate infrastructure.
CondoHub.featureAntifraudDesc: Tabs showing exact chronology for a resident—fines, bookings, active tickets—justifying HOA actions.
CondoHub.featureIntegrityDesc: Staff clock-ins securely logic-tested. Managers receive active alerts on labor compliance deviations instantly.
CondoHub.featureDeepfakeDesc: Residents log technicians entering. An instant alert pops down at the guards desk right on schedule safely.
CondoHub.featureGPSTDesc: Precludes silent deletion of fines by saving immutable logs indicating exactly who and why a warning vanished.
CondoHub.howStep1Desc: We provision dedicated Single-Tenant databases, assuring your data operates completely siloed.
CondoHub.howStep2Desc: Profiles map the virtual barrier. Concierge views stay drastically limited strictly away from admin panels.
CondoHub.howStep3Desc: From clock-ins to ticket resolutions, operations accelerate into an interconnected, fully documented cycle.
CondoHub.seoSectionDesc: Modern housing environments mitigate conflicts using principles of data analysis. CondoHub brings uncompromising Single-Tenant architecture. Unchangeable logs, centralized dossiers and robust credentials offer forensic-grade capability for building management.
CondoHub.faq1Q: Does the Resident Dossier and its infractions hold up legally in assemblies?
CondoHub.faq1A: Yes. The system writes exact timestamp entries. It inherits evidence-chain architectures backing decisions inherently.
CondoHub.faq2Q: How do the Digital Time Clock alerts for the staff actually limit liability?
CondoHub.faq2A: Proactive alerting to the manager regarding approaching shift limits or break violations avoids later massive HR lawsuits.
CondoHub.faq3Q: How do you structure Data Privacy (LGPD/GDPR)?
CondoHub.faq3A: Via Single-Tenant instantiation. Your property data rests inside a totally isolated container physically blind to neighbors natively.
CondoHub.faq4Q: Can warning histories be secretly deleted by malicious staff?
CondoHub.faq4A: No. Soft-deletes keep the item hidden from normal views but display prominently on audit reports with authors attached inevitably.
CondoHub.faq5Q: Is financial billing and invoice issuance done directly inside the platform?
CondoHub.faq5A: It functions through a strict Ticket workflow directed to the external property manager company explicitly to avoid duplicate gateways.
CondoHub.faq6Q: Do front desk agents see my bill requests and financial details?
CondoHub.faq6A: No. Deeply rooted framework constraints ensure specific administrative modules render entirely invisible to concierge permissions securely.
CondoHub.faq7Q: Can multiple properties be managed collectively?
CondoHub.faq7A: A multi-condo dashboard (Master View) is being refined for administration firms allowing wide views without database fusion technically.
CondoHub.faq8A: Platform strictly digitizes the flow controls, human logging and concierge screens natively over integrating directly into external hardware right now.
CondoHub.transDesc: Highly structured tracing. We advise boards to clearly publish the software rule implications internally to guarantee smooth community trust instantly.
CondoHub.gallerySubtitle: Dark UI optimized to rest the eyes during 24/7 security front desk operations.
CondoHub.galleryImg1Desc: Visual workflow escalating Warnings directly into traceable financial penalties smoothly.
CondoHub.galleryImg2Desc: Dispatch pinned alerts exclusively visible within the resident portals strictly.
CondoHub.galleryImg3Desc: A central panel summarizing complaints, visit flows and marketplace interactions clearly.
CondoHub.galleryImg4Desc: Amenity booking tied to custom granular restrictions and availability parameters exclusively.
CondoHub.finalCtaTitle: Ready to armor your property operations?
CondoHub.finalCtaDesc: Access advanced technical tracking. Frictionless flows, precise clock, and flawless oversight.
CondoHub.finalLimits: Exclusive B2B Platform for Modern Condo Administrators
CondoHub.finalSecurityQuestion: Got questions concerning your current database migration or adoption curve?
CondoHub.finalContactLink: Talk with us directly on WhatsApp

Services.pageSubtitle: This page explains how we contract and execute projects. To learn about available applications and solutions, visit the Solutions page.

Services.step2Text: We define delivery model, scope, governance and tracking indicators.
Services.step3Text: We execute with technical documentation, checkpoints and objective result validation.
Services.chooseModelTitle: Choose the most suitable delivery model
Services.model1When: Ideal for demands with clear objectives, defined timelines and well-delimited deliverables.
Services.model1Include1: Technical assessment and formal scope definition
Services.model1Include2: Timeline with milestones and acceptance criteria
Services.model2When: For organizations that need to accelerate backlog and maintain technical evolution cadence.
Services.model2Include1: Continuous support in product, engineering and data

Portfolio.metaTitle: Digital Forensics Software Portfolio | Investigation Systems
Portfolio.metaDesc: Explore our portfolio of digital forensics software, investigation systems, evidence analysis tools, fraud technology, BI, and compliance platforms.
Portfolio.heroTitle: Portfolio of digital forensics software and investigation systems
Portfolio.heroDesc: Explore software projects in production, pilot, and development across digital forensics, fraud investigation, evidence analysis, BI, and automation for critical environments.
Portfolio.heroSolutionsLink: To see solutions available for contracting and demo, visit the
Portfolio.talesBio1: Official forensic expert at the Civil Police of Minas Gerais (Brazil) since 2005, with a Master's in Analytical Chemistry from UFMG, PhD in Chemistry from UFLA, and post-doctorate in Data Science from UFLA.
Portfolio.talesBio2: Works in digital forensics, forensic investigation and evidence validation, focusing on computational methods, applied AI and technical traceability. Since 2019, manages regional forensics operations, integrating operational leadership and technological innovation.
Portfolio.matheusBio1: Full Stack Developer focused on software for digital forensics, forensic investigation and data analysis.
Portfolio.matheusBio2: Works on developing SaaS platforms, BI and automation for document governance, audit and compliance. Performance & Data intern at Critéria Financial Group and director of GEPID (Digital Investigation Study Group), with practical experience in architecture, integrations and products for critical environments.
Portfolio.projectsTitle: Software projects in production, pilot, and development
Portfolio.biTitle: BI for Public Safety & Forensic Investigation (2024)
Portfolio.biDesc: Completed project with dashboards to support forensic management and operational decisions in public safety. The solution organizes data from multiple sources into panels focused on traceability and management insights.
Portfolio.biResult: Practical result: over 60% improvement in the speed of institutional analyses at PCMG.
Portfolio.faceidDesc:
Forensic facial recognition script with real-world use in PCMG databases, developed to support triage and validation of visual evidence in investigative scenarios.

Current performance: 100% accuracy for individual faces and above 85% for images with multiple faces. In final development phase for expanded practical operation.
Portfolio.evidenceosDesc:
Application already running internally at the regional custody unit for trace management, structured queries and control of objects under forensic responsibility.

The system generates reports and alerts, allows retrieval scheduling and operates with MySQL. Currently in hosting and deployment phase (Hostinger) for regional sharing.
Portfolio.metascopeDesc:
Most advanced portfolio solution for deepfake analysis, authenticity verification and integrity validation of digital files in sensitive contexts.

Currently in testing phase with communities and partners, with continuous evolution of the analytical engine and application in forensics, compliance, law and investigative journalism scenarios.
Portfolio.condohubDesc:
Platform with SQL database deployed and focused on property management with compliance trails and document governance for day-to-day operations.

Includes electronic timekeeping, document integrity, scheduling, meeting minutes, incidents and geolocated audit features, positioned for condominiums and property managers.
Portfolio.scamtraceDesc:
Forensic investigation platform for detecting digital fraud and homograph attacks, with architecture designed to reduce user exposure to risks during analysis.

Combines suspicious link analysis, advanced OCR and evidence traceability, with over 90% accuracy in fraud validation scenarios and compliance support.
Portfolio.docAnalysisDesc:
AI-assisted analysis for forensic reports and other documents, focusing on technical triage and identification of relevant patterns.

Project in partnership with other developers. The layered architecture reduces LLM token consumption and accelerates the workflow with traceability.
Portfolio.mobileForensicsDesc:
Specialized work in forensic data extraction, evidence analysis and technical processing of information from smartphones and digital media.

Project in partnership with other developers to interpret reports with graphs, repetition patterns and behavioral analysis. Goal: reduce analyses from 12 hours to about 2 hours.
Portfolio.platformDesc:
Institutional platform built entirely with TypeScript and React for technical-commercial positioning, brand authority and partnership opportunity generation.

Project with structured SEO and complete Google indexing, including Google AdSense approval, result of careful content implementation, architecture and technical quality.
Portfolio.inspectaDesc:
System for document management with versioning, integrity control and complete audit trails in high-responsibility environments.

Developed in collaboration with other senior devs, in final evolution phase focused on governance, compliance and operational reliability.
Portfolio.synapseDesc:
SaaS designed to act as an analytical synapse between data and documents, using robust Python backend scripts for classification, extraction and content correlation.

Already tested with complex police investigation reports, including cell tower connection scenarios, focused on accelerating technical analysis and supporting operational decisions.
Portfolio.ecoDesc:
SaaS for companies that need to centralize environmental management with document control, license tracking and regulatory obligations in an auditable environment.

Includes carbon credit sandbox for simulation and structuring operations, helping reduce chances of environmental sanctions and increase company visibility with green marketing strategies.
Portfolio.demoNote: Some of these applications can be demonstrated upon request.
Portfolio.viewAppsLink: View applications in final development phase
Portfolio.seoTitle: Digital forensics software, investigation tools, and evidence systems
Portfolio.seoDesc: Investigação Forense develops software, data platforms, and digital evidence systems for forensic experts, investigators, law firms, and compliance teams. Our portfolio includes evidence analysis, fraud investigation, forensic reporting, geolocation, audit, hash integrity, and traceability tools.
